name: Carne De Puerco En Chile Verde (Pork with Green Chile)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork or beef into small cubes.
2. Saute in oil until well browned.
3. Drain off all but 1 tablespoon fat.
4. Add chopped chiles, garlic, onion, tomato, and boiling water.
5. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
6. Cover tightly and simmer for 1 hour.
